data_quality_gate.verdict: FAIL — group/page assignment logging bug detected; SRM on raw counts alone would have missed this.
data_quality_gate.action_taken: Removed all mismatched rows, then dropped any remaining duplicate user_id (kept first occurrence). This is a data-cleaning decision made BEFORE looking at the conversion outcome, based purely on assignment integrity, to avoid the appearance of cherry-picking rows that support a particular result.

guardrails: None available — dataset does not include revenue, refund, or support-contact fields. Documented as a limitation rather than fabricating a guardrail from data that doesn't exist.

decision.decision: DO NOT SHIP — keep old page
reasons: Conversion rate difference not statistically significant (p=0.190), and the point estimate is actually slightly NEGATIVE for the new page. No evidence the redesign helps.
